FEIYAP_ENCHANTMENT_FEIYAP_INFUSION_ENCHA: At the start of the first turn of combat, play this card automatically.
FEIYAP_ENCHANTMENT_FEIYAP_ASSAULT_ENCHAN: Whenever you play another [gold]Attack[/gold], play this card automatically.
FEIYAP_ENCHANTMENT_FEIYAP_REKINDLE_ENCHA: The first time this card is played each combat, return it to your Hand.
